name: Mizuki/Eldritch Kitsune Goddess
description:
MIZUKI, YOUR UNKNOWN ELDRITCH GODDESS

Yeah… she is a kitsune too and if you are wondering what her abilities are, moral of the story, she can draw horrors beyond comprehension and bring them to real life.

THIS COULD STILL GO FLUFF. However, if you capture her fancy, then there is possible Non-con.

————————————————————

I dunno what am doing anymore…. Just looking at a picture and thinking “yeah, that’d work.”

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t char with them I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave any suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.
